# First-Agent

> Locally orchestrated, mixed-tier LLM coding agent for a single
> power-user. Filesystem-canonical knowledge (Markdown + YAML
> frontmatter); read-side scales lazily from grep to BM25 to
> vectors only when the corpus justifies it. Implementation language
> is Python; target codebases the agent reads can be anything.
>
> This file is an index for LLM agents that want to ingest the
> project documentation in one fetch. Paths below are GitHub raw URLs against
> the `main` branch of the **canonical repo**
> `GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent`. Forks
> `GrasshopperBoy/First-Agent-fork` and
> `Bupitsa-ai/First-Agent-debloat` are parallel work-trees — different
> agents run in different forks; cross-fork PRs land back upstream
> via the lead. Any of these is a valid working repo from an agent's
> perspective; `main` is kept in sync across all of them. If a URL
> below 404s mid-cycle, replace the canonical owner/repo segment with
> one of the fork pairs and retry.
>
> **Project stage.** Currently in **Stage 1** (documentation + agent
> development через Devin) of the three-stage evolution defined in
> [`knowledge/project-overview.md` §1.3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/project-overview.md).

> **Tiered layout.** §MUST READ FIRST is the smallest path that
> bootstraps a session (six files, in order). §TASK ROUTING points
> task-types at the right primary entrypoint. §BY-DEMAND INDEX
> below is the full per-folder file list — open only the entries
> relevant to the task at hand.

## MUST READ FIRST

Six files cover ~90% of session-start context. Read in order:

1. [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/README.md) — project overview (Russian).
2. [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md) — rules, PR checklist, query routing, **§Pre-flight checklist** (run BEFORE any non-trivial task).
3. [knowledge/project-overview.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/project-overview.md) — §1.1 four-pillar goal; §1.2 minimalism-first principle.
4. [HANDOFF.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/HANDOFF.md) — current state, next steps, recently-landed research notes.
5. [knowledge/adr/DIGEST.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/DIGEST.md) — one-paragraph cheat-sheet for ADR-1..7 + amendments. Authoritative source remains the per-ADR files.
6. [docs/glossary.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/glossary.md) — canonical definitions for project-specific terms (axis, lens, pillar, NLAH, ACI, harness, hook, UC1..UC5, MCP, subtraction-first, minimalism-first, R-S-M).

## TASK ROUTING

Task type → primary entrypoint, then secondary:

- **Inner-loop / tool-registry implementation** → [knowledge/adr/ADR-7-inner-loop-tool-registry-contract.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-7-inner-loop-tool-registry-contract.md), then [research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md) (§0 Decision Briefing + §10 contract sketch). Secondary: [research/cutting-edge-agent-research-radar-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/cutting-edge-agent-research-radar-2026-05.md), [research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md).
- **New ADR or amendment** → [knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md) + [AGENTS.md PR Checklist rule #9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md#pr-checklist) (must append a block to `exploration_log.md` and update `DIGEST.md` row in the same PR).
- **New module / Phase M PR** → [research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md) §9 roadmap + [ADR DIGEST](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/DIGEST.md). Cite minimalism-first per [AGENTS.md PR Checklist rule #10](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md#pr-checklist).
- **Research-briefing note** → [knowledge/prompts/research-briefing.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/research-briefing.md), then [knowledge/research/_template.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/_template.md) (§0 Decision Briefing pre-filled). Output rule: [AGENTS.md PR Checklist rule #8](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md#pr-checklist).
- **Edit `knowledge/trace/exploration_log.md`** → schema in [knowledge/README.md §`trace/`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/README.md); origin in [research/ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md) §9 R-1.
- **Specific number / date / quote** → primary source from `source:` frontmatter, NOT a summary. Per [AGENTS.md §Query Routing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md#query-routing).

## BY-DEMAND INDEX

### Repo entrypoints

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/README.md): Project overview, current status, roadmap (Russian).
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI agents working in this repo (English).
- [HANDOFF.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/HANDOFF.md): Cross-LLM session handoff — current state, next steps, bootstrap pointer (mirrors the Devin Knowledge note).

### Docs (`docs/`)

- [docs/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/README.md): Wiki index.
- [docs/architecture.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/architecture.md): Three-layer agent architecture (Interface / Cognitive / Execution).
- [docs/workflow.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/workflow.md): R-S-M lifecycle, Devin session conventions, and parallel-agent fork coordination.
- [docs/prompting.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/prompting.md): T1-T5 prompt templates and anti-patterns.
- [docs/glossary.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/docs/glossary.md): Project glossary.

*Archived 2026-05-08 (in-place stubs, excluded from this routing surface): `docs/devin-reference.md` (Devin-specific — restored once `llms.txt` learns to gate by agent host), `docs/agent-creation-github.md` (external-tutorial transcript; live ADR-7 inputs are `research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md` and `research/how-to-build-an-agent-ampcode-2026-04.md`).*

### Project knowledge (`knowledge/`)

- [knowledge/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/README.md): Knowledge folder conventions, frontmatter schema, query routing.
- [knowledge/project-overview.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/project-overview.md): Product/scope snapshot for v0.1; §1.1 four-pillar goal (research-backed implementation + pragmatic single-user + most efficient open-source harness + iteration-via-measurement); §1.2 minimalism-first principle; §1.3 three-stage project evolution.
- [knowledge/MAINTENANCE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/MAINTENANCE.md): Maintenance / cross-reference / sweep-cadence rules — single canonical list of «touch these files when archiving / superseding / amending». Companion to `BACKLOG.md`; referenced from AGENTS.md PR Checklist rule #5.
- [knowledge/BACKLOG.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/BACKLOG.md): Deferred-ideas tracking with unblock-triggers — I-1 (planner picks skills), I-2 (sub-agents), I-3 (dispatcher LLM); each entry names the concrete artefact whose existence moves the idea from «deferred» to «actionable».

### ADRs (`knowledge/adr/`)

- [knowledge/adr/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/README.md): ADR process and index.
- [knowledge/adr/DIGEST.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/DIGEST.md): One-paragraph cheat-sheet per accepted ADR + amendments. Cheap-read overlay; authoritative source remains the per-ADR file. Updated in the same PR whenever an amendment lands (AGENTS.md PR Checklist rule #9).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-template.md): ADR template (copy when adding a new decision).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-1-v01-use-case-scope.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-1-v01-use-case-scope.md): v0.1 use-case scope (UC1 + UC3 in; UC4 deferred; UC2 best-effort); Amendment 2026-05-01 deferred UC5; Amendment 2026-05-06 expanded UC5 to eval-driven harness iteration (5a-5e).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-2-llm-tiering.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-2-llm-tiering.md): LLM tiering and access (static role routing; Planner / Coder / Debug / Eval).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-3-memory-architecture-variant.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-3-memory-architecture-variant.md): Memory architecture variant for v0.1 (Variant A "Mechanical Wiki").
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-4-storage-backend.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-4-storage-backend.md): Storage backend for v0.1 (SQLite FTS5).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-5-chunker-tool.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-5-chunker-tool.md): Chunker tool selection for v0.1 (universal-ctags + markdown-it-py).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-6-tool-sandbox-allow-list.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-6-tool-sandbox-allow-list.md): Tool sandbox & path allow-list policy for v0.1 (deny-by-default read+write allow-list at `~/.fa/sandbox.toml`).
- [knowledge/adr/ADR-7-inner-loop-tool-registry-contract.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/adr/ADR-7-inner-loop-tool-registry-contract.md): Inner-loop and tool-registry contract for v0.1 (MCP-shaped in-process dispatcher, progressive tool disclosure, hooks, traces, bounded ACI tools).

### Exploration log (`knowledge/trace/`)

- [knowledge/trace/exploration_log.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/trace/exploration_log.md): Telegraphic markdown overlay — one `## Q-N` block per accepted ADR with `Chosen:` and each `Rejected:` option carrying `Reason:` + `Lesson:`. Schema in [`knowledge/README.md` §`trace/`](./README.md#trace--exploration-log); origin in research note [`ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md`](./research/ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md) §9 R-1. Converted from YAML DAG 2026-05-10 per Tsinghua NLAH finding.

### Prompts (`knowledge/prompts/`)

- [knowledge/prompts/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/README.md): Prompts library conventions and index.
- [knowledge/prompts/RESOLVER.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/RESOLVER.md): Intent-to-template dispatcher (T1-T5 plus role prompts).
- [knowledge/prompts/research-topic.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/research-topic.md): T1 research-topic task prompt.
- [knowledge/prompts/architect-fa.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/architect-fa.md): Architect / Planner system prompt (full).
- [knowledge/prompts/architect-fa-compact.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/architect-fa-compact.md): Architect / Planner system prompt (compact).
- [knowledge/prompts/research-briefing.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/prompts/research-briefing.md): Research-briefing workflow — goal-lens elicitation, deep-dive note with §0 Decision Briefing, chat handover. Use for cross-reference / paper-vs-architecture reviews.

### Research (`knowledge/research/`)

> Convention: rows for notes produced via the research-briefing
> workflow lead with a `[goal: <one-sentence>]` prefix so an agent
> reading this index can filter by current task without loading the
> note. Older rows can be migrated lazily (rule #8 in AGENTS.md is
> forward-only).

- [knowledge/research/_template.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/_template.md): Skeleton for new research notes — frontmatter v1+v2 + `goal_lens:` + §0 Decision Briefing pre-filled. Pair with `prompts/research-briefing.md`.
- [knowledge/research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/memory-architecture-design-2026-04-26.md): Memory architecture roadmap, three variants, open questions. Source for ADR-3.
- [knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/llm-wiki-critique.md): Cross-cutting critique of LLM-Wiki / GraphRAG approaches.
- [knowledge/research/socraticode-code-intelligence-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/socraticode-code-intelligence-2026-05.md): [goal: Identify what First-Agent can use, benefit from, or learn from SocratiCode without violating v0.1 scope or license constraints.] Cross-reference of SocratiCode's MCP code-intelligence engine against First-Agent ADR-1..6; recommends context-artifact manifests, local RRF fusion, resumable indexing contracts, graph-compatible IDs, prompt-level search discipline, and an AGPL license firewall.

*Archived 2026-05-08 (in-place stubs, excluded from this routing surface; open the file directly for git-history / audit — banner at top points to the live superseder): `agent-roles.md` (→ ADR-2 + DIGEST.md), `agent-video-research.md` (→ `research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md`), `architect-fa-refactor-ru.md` (→ `knowledge/prompts/architect-fa{,-compact}.md`), `llm-wiki-community-batch-{1,2}.md` (→ ADR-3 + DIGEST.md), `llm-wiki-critique-sources.md` and `llm-wiki-critique-first-agent.md` (→ `research/llm-wiki-critique.md`), `ai-context-os-memm-deep-dive.md` and `agentic-memory-supplement.md` (→ ADR-3 + DIGEST.md), `cross-reference-ampcode-sliders-to-adr-2026-04.md` (→ ADR-2/4/5/6 amendments + `research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md` §10).*

- [knowledge/research/chunker-design.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/chunker-design.md): Chunker design — universal-ctags vs tree-sitter vs per-language regex; recommendation for ADR-5.
- [knowledge/research/how-to-build-an-agent-ampcode-2026-04.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/how-to-build-an-agent-ampcode-2026-04.md): Разбор статьи Thorsten Ball / Amp «How to Build an Agent» — inner-loop, tool registry, 3 базовых tool'а (read_file / list_files / edit_file); mapping на ADR-1/ADR-2 и UC1.
- [knowledge/research/sliders-structured-reasoning-2026-04.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/sliders-structured-reasoning-2026-04.md): Разбор препринта SLIDERS (Stanford OV AL, arXiv:2604.22294) — aggregation-bottleneck, contextualized chunking, schema induction, relevance gate, primary-key reconciliation, SQL-QA; mapping на ADR-3 / ADR-4 / ADR-5 и UC2 / UC3.
- [knowledge/research/ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/ara-protocol-cross-reference-2026-05.md): Cross-reference review Ara protocol (arXiv:2604.24658v2, Orchestra Research) против ADR-1..6 + HANDOFF.md — mapping four layers / Live Research Manager / Compiler / Seal на текущие artefact'ы FA, риски наивного заимствования, 10 пронумерованных рекомендаций (R-1..R-10) и 11 открытых вопросов под решение лида.
- [knowledge/research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/semi-autonomous-agents-cross-reference-2026-05.md): Критический разбор трёх источников по semi-autonomous LLM-агентам (deep-research-report, semi-autonomous-llm-agents research, репо `nextlevelbuilder/goclaw`) против ADR-1..6 — accept/defer/reject фильтрация; основа для ADR-2 §Amendment 2026-05-01 (MCP forward-compat), ADR-1 §Amendment 2026-05-01 (UC5 deferred), and ADR-7 (ACI principle, hooks primitive).
- [knowledge/research/cutting-edge-agent-research-radar-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/cutting-edge-agent-research-radar-2026-05.md): Радар cutting-edge исследований для First-Agent v0.1/v0.2 — MCP/tool registry, ACI, hooks, memory, eval traces, sandbox/audit и multi-agent coordination; backlog input для ADR-7 and future module PRs.
- [knowledge/research/agent-ui-research-radar-v0-2-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/agent-ui-research-radar-v0-2-2026-05.md): Agent UI radar for First-Agent v0.2 — Hermes Agent UI implementations, Pi surfaces/packages, OpenClaw gateway/UI forks, and human-agent UI research; backlog input for future UI/control-plane ADR prep.
- [knowledge/research/latent-verifier-evolve-research-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/latent-verifier-evolve-research-2026-05.md): [goal: Form a list of research artifacts that strengthen First-Agent and identify source ideas worth carrying forward.] Corrective research-briefing note on Latent Space Survey, CUA Verifiers, Squeeze Evolve, and CUAVerifierBench vs ADR-1..6 — §0 Decision Briefing with 6 recommendations: acceptance rubric fixtures, per-session tool registry, trace/eval schema, latent-space watch-list, gated dynamic routing, CUAVerifierBench as schema reference.
- [knowledge/research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GITcrassuskey-shop/First-Agent/main/knowledge/research/efficient-llm-agent-harness-2026-05.md): [goal: Подготовить решения для ADR-7 inner-loop / tool-contract — эффективный First-Agent v0.1 harness без расширения v0.1 scope, с явным cross-reference на ADR-1..6 и primary-source-cited evidence base.] Single source-of-truth research-briefing note for ADR-7 prep объединяющая две ранние редакции (upstream PR #37 + PR #38, обе close-without-merge); §0 Decision Briefing с девятью recommendations (R-1..R-9, 8 TAKE + 1 DEFER, 0 surviving UNCERTAIN-ASK), §10 ADR-7 contract sketch (ToolSpec / ToolResult / Trace + R-8 static-layered-prompt invariant + R-7 subtraction-first acceptance-block).
